indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to setting up a computer workstation, as it takes up a large portion of the space and is not suitable for prolonged sitting.

indicators.name: lack of flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height available for placing a laptop or keyboard, making it difficult to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be low, which would make it challenging to see the screen clearly and comfortably for extended periods.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The space does not appear to be designed for focused work, as it includes a bed and other non-work-related furniture, which can be distracting.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While there is a bed and some furniture, the lack of a flat personal work surface, low lighting, and a non-dedicated workspace layout make it challenging to set up a comfortable and efficient workstation. The presence of a bed and other non-work-related furniture also adds distractions and makes the space less suitable for focused solo work.
